name: ask-node-codebase
description: Answer focused questions about a Node.js codebase (JavaScript or TypeScript) using Node-specific expertise (Express, Fastify, NestJS, Hono, Next.js API routes, tRPC, Prisma, Drizzle, TypeORM, Zod, decorator-driven codebases, monorepos, ESM/CJS, edge runtimes). Conversational Q&A — no report files, no ledger, no multi-phase ceremony. For producing a written onboarding artifact instead, use the separate `onboard-node` plugin.
